title: reviews/<item-id>/<angle>.json (recommended template)
description: Recommended schema for one reviewer subagent's verdict for one item in the default workflow. This is NOT a harness contract — the harness does not read or parse review files (Issue 4). Pass/fail is determined by the review phase's post: commands, not by harness-level aggregation. The default workflow ships a post command that reads these files and checks verdicts. Users with different review models may define their own schema or skip review entirely.

item_id.description: The item identifier as extracted by the stage's items_id expression. No pattern enforced (Issue 2).

reviewer.description: Reviewer angle label (e.g. security, complexity, best-practices). Must match the <angle>.json file name.

notes.description: Optional free-form summary; not interpreted by the aggregator.

category.description: Free-text angle label (e.g. security, perf, style).
